info.title: DevExpress Maui XAML Tools
info.description: This tool replaces DevExpress clr-namespaces with a common xml-namespace in XAML files: `xmlns:dx="http://schemas.devexpress.com/maui"`

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: This tool replaces DevExpress clr-namespaces with a common xml-namespace in XAML files: `xmlns:dx="http://schemas.devexpress.com/maui"`.

arguments.name: Path
arguments.description: The path to a file or folder [default: <path>]
